x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Developer user volume determines the scale of productivity gains from Now Assist Code Generation. More active developers means greater aggregate time savings from AI-assisted scripting, flow creation, and application development.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Identify and onboard developers to Now Assist for Creator to maximize AI code generation adoption.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_de03e33acfd903108935fb251d851c90
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
<ai_justification><![CDATA[Developer user volume determines the scale of productivity gains from Now Assist Code Generation. More active developers means greater aggregate time savings from AI-assisted scripting, flow creation, and application development.]]></ai_justification>
<check_name>Developer User Volume</check_name>
<check_script><![CDATA[(function(){
var ga=new GlideAggregate("sys_user_has_role");
ga.addQuery("role.name","IN","admin,mid_server,app_engine_developer,delegated_developer");
ga.addAggregate("COUNT");ga.query();
var c=ga.next()?parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")):0;
if(c>=10)return{status:"ready",actualValue:c+" developers",finding:c+" users with developer roles found."};
if(c>0)return{status:"needs_attention",actualValue:c+" developers",finding:c+" developer(s) found."};
return{status:"needs_attention",actualValue:"0 developers",finding:"No users with developer roles found."};
})()]]></check_script>
<is_active>true</is_active>
<is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive>
<is_manual>false</is_manual>
<module>CREATOR</module>
<number>CHK0006189</number>
<order/>
<remediation_guidance>Identify and onboard developers to Now Assist for Creator to maximize AI code generation adoption.</remediation_guidance>
<sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by>
<sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:06:00</sys_created_on>
<sys_id>de03e33acfd903108935fb251d851c90</sys_id>
<sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count>
<sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by>
<sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:06:00</sys_updated_on>
</x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
